name: Hillsdale College via Free Thinker Daily
subject: Educating our children honestly
body:
| | | [](https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum?sc=00102N0242IG9DODEES&utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1776_curriculum&utm_content=TMA-Direct-Parler)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point.
In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you've even seen this happening in your local schools.
As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats?
Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation's history?
We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America's future.
For this reason, we have produced the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ --and I'm writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide.
**What is the _Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_? **
The**_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively.
This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College--and we are making it available **free of charge**.
To be clear, the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children.
It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844.
And we need your help to make the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact.
_We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the _**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**_ and our other outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _
That's an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible.
One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support --not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you--citizens who agree with Hillsdale's mission on behalf of liberty.
We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale's 179-year-old mission--to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."
With that mission in mind, we produced the _**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**_ --and now we need your help to promote it nationwide.
Will you take this opportunity to _**support the _Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_
Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty--and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty--I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today.
**I 've included a secure link for your convenience here: **
_**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum?sc=00102N0242IG9DODEES&utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1776_curriculum&utm_content=TMA-Direct-Parler)**_
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

[View this email in your browser](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/v/hda7YgNmmt?hids=7y3IVQx7)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300 Alexandria, VA 22314

[**Unsubscribe**](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=7y3IVQx7)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8105%2E878179%2EXaHfM7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8105%2E878179%2EXaHfM7).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=8105%2E878179%2EXaHfM7) to request fewer emails. name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrr6jgqt5firlcrqfkmkluh07v75qcri2i3cl42g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3i61o72c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhv948o9k6a34birgd53dqelfoimhcvlcoeq81do_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3i61o72c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3dck2io24fpu9l0bdhpjcj2hac2hqth83kmvv08_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3i61o72c1h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Anna Kaplan via Blue Amp Action
subject: George Santos hires Marjorie Taylor Greene campaign treasurer
body:
MTG’s campaign manager?!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b5c5304-a73b-418e-bda1-3d0b13c035f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | BREAKING NEWS: George Santos hires Marjorie Taylor Greene campaign treasurer [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f400b45-8115-4b55-bb4a-e96d4c357ad6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress against George Santos. My opponent informed the Federal Election Commission this weekend that he has hired Marjorie Taylor Greene’s campaign treasurer as the treasurer for his own campaign. He made the change after being charged by federal prosecutors with breaking campaign finance laws, theft of public money, and wire fraud. It’s not surprising that Santos would hire Greene’s treasurer. After all, they agree on everything else -- they’re both: ❌ Opposed to women’s reproductive rights ❌ Pro-gun fanatics (Santos even wore an AR-15 lapel pin on the House floor) ❌ Anti-democracy ❌ Lying Trump supporters who claim Joe Biden didn’t win the 2020 presidential election. [George Santos is a disgrace -- I’m running to defeat him to restore honor and integrity to the U.S. Congress. Will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help me win?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0353fcd1-ff86-4730-9103-dc899be090ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for your support, Anna Kaplan

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee58aa28-8020-4d88-a3ac-718f3eaa1fb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | Fellow American, This is our absolute last shot.

**Our deadline extension expires[TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8adc08f2d0a545ef976abc0310326444&_e=S9lgF_WoOn3lRCMyFkN2Kel5R5Vt8XQmz6oztZ8H6ETBYIsP3G-cV-lprZCJCC_069UxGGRHlW-R5_81HwD0cW5tg-ZSgyHEmoS69DdbogbRuHwh-PER9JaOAHdz3_J7VmjR6IGIiTl_IKOlZg5fR2fYZuO5AEaw1sscXY6Bu_ntfSzu3zDehr2GjPxYTeqo0Kh6GrT_KRpiojugDPy5oLGA3qV0JAiTQVB59RUIeknna-8cgljtP8bE0DBHtjtygnVpfpuQfyBciRMM0MNmWDYnFylVdi_9gaCJJek9LWdyCixPFIAaprwHJwSl8r1mvNkoPRqpXPwZP4Rbj-h4HwL4_zyhOo905twx-yGiCVW37XUG54g6pdwbbwNEutY6ujTuaESx8P1xVvEh70VLbGrHUA1bIED6i1HnmPR8mUI%3D) **

The Democrat agenda is absolutely TERRIFYING.

They want to use big tech to poison our children with woke propaganda and REWRITE basic truth, common sense, and American culture.

_The ONLY way to stop them is to take back our Senate majority - and we can’t do that without meeting every single goal._

I’m not backing down, Fellow American. Too much is at stake. We can’t give up, and I’m trusting you.

Team – Happy Pride Month!

I am proud to represent every single resident of central and southern Illinois, but this month, I want to celebrate and uplift our LGBTQ+ neighbors. Pride Month is an opportunity to center the joy and victories won by LGBTQ+ people, and continue to push for equality as allies at a time when rights, especially trans rights, are under attack.

I hope you’ll join me not only in celebrating this joyous month, but in committing to creating communities where each of us feels accepted and cared for just the way we are every day. We’re all stronger when we stand together, and I’m always standing with you.

With solidarity and pride,

Nikki
| Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64269200/409555470/-345890914?refcode=EM_C_230603Pride_NB_4_footer&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Q0NDYwNC0yMjAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MVlCUfmKApMBm6cGBXZLlPDKOo3vmjRDZAjeNCRAFQY=).

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Happy Pride Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
This month is a moment for us to affirm our commitment towards justice and equality for all

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64269337/409556205/1633369994?refcode=EM_C_230603Pride_DBW_5_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE0NmU5MjItMjMwMi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dGfyLVTLwyiVu22so7Fudh1Xe-UPFE-e12ahto1VL9k=)
Peter,

On Thursday, I went to my first Pride event of the month and now, I am reaching out to share the importance of this month to me. Pride is a time to acknowledge the obstacles our LGBTQ+ heroes have overcome in the face of adversity and prejudice, and to celebrate their triumphs and contributions to our communities.

This month is also a moment for us to affirm our commitment towards justice and equality for all. The inherent dignity and worth of our trans neighbors are under attack in Texas and across the country. We all deserve the freedom to achieve the best and truest version of ourselves – so we must stand against bigotry, hate, and intolerance.

Please join me in celebrating with our LGBTQ+ neighbors this month and continue to stand with me against oppression and discrimination every day. Together, we can ensure that all Americans have the freedom to thrive.

Happy Pride Month,

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64269338/409556206/1633369994?refcode=EM_C_230603Pride_DBW_5_signoff&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjE0NmU5MjItMjMwMi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dGfyLVTLwyiVu22so7Fudh1Xe-UPFE-e12ahto1VL9k=)

Brian | Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

You can support Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District by making a one-time contribution here:

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zevlifn55nttkmcih6ergeokiff5asugf36ubfq0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h60or2c9h2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvb6mevsovqc32cbt0bdpq3al93ebqmhsm4k2p5o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h60or2c9h2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zovku3etp8olu806aear5bi088djb53bbhis9ll0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h60or2c9h2bs)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zakb6pkt1itpco73ia4jvc1nm1g34d9lctj4nkeo_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h60or2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk588126ubpnhqi8h00fgbstj2697a4gq66c5v4g_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h60or2cph2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt433evlsq6mfos5l7rsd66aiablbq7dgjevkteg_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h60or2cph2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Jamaal’s courageous leadership on Palestinian rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvn7Qm0iGIrReV9UcChKbkV45W-SCGHqZVVUVHX9Kv2q9ibHcmtlSjHiYxbUnZAspOJK6VonghFz-yEXM8DsjGoiNaTX4h2R4UPKsrhxOy3TZ5b3eU2CbaVz8rxfWT3R3TWAcDkXsk9HepBWBKO57SWpchIwLyPYqL94zX_YsBtD0nM0OQbiZWKZfiYMtjmMxK95EkusFZPXdPaHgj7ATCuA/3wq/y_5rYAaHRx2TTI4dnXcIVA/h0/qOn_s1LFHghDM0DuPjaTN1WV6ndnxeEL-1yIPU18duU)
---
Friend, It’s meaningful to me when my colleagues in Congress take a stand for Palestinian rights, because it requires a lot of political courage in the face of attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo. My colleague Rep. Jamaal Bowman has really stepped up, including by leading a recent letter calling on President Biden and the State Department to ensure that U.S. taxpayer dollars don’t fund human rights abuses by the Israeli government against the Palestinian people. Black people and Palestinians are criminalized just for existing.

Human rights organizations around the world have recognized what Palestinians have said for decades: the Israeli government is oppressing the Palestinian people and systematically denying equal rights to Palestinians—in what constitutes apartheid and ethnic cleansing.
And we know that the U.S. is complicit, sending billions of dollars each year to the Israeli military and silencing criticism of Israeli policies. That’s why we need to keep building power in the U.S. Congress to advocate for change. clean_body: Our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected. | | | Friend, It’s meaningful to me when my colleagues in Congress take a stand for Palestinian rights, because it requires a lot of political courage in the face of attacks from those who want to maintain the unjust status quo. My colleague Rep. Jamaal Bowman has really stepped up, including by leading a recent letter calling on President Biden and the State Department to ensure that U.S. taxpayer dollars don’t fund human rights abuses by the Israeli government against the Palestinian people. | While visiting the West Bank in 2021, Jamaal met with my sity (grandmother) and was then blocked at a military checkpoint near her house. He experienced in-person what it’s like for Palestinians to live in fear under constant military presence. And he connects it to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. growing up with intimidating police forces targeting Black communities. Black people and Palestinians are criminalized just for existing. Our struggles for justice and liberation are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. We all deserve human dignity and freedom. Human rights organizations around the world have recognized what Palestinians have said for decades: the Israeli government is oppressing the Palestinian people and systematically denying equal rights to Palestinians—in what constitutes apartheid and ethnic cleansing. And we know that the U.S. is complicit, sending billions of dollars each year to the Israeli military and silencing criticism of Israeli policies. That’s why we need to keep building power in the U.S. Congress to advocate for change. Let’s start by supporting members of Congress like Jamaal Bowman, who are taking the lead despite being targeted for speaking up. subject: a coffee can in the basement

body:
|
#
Hi, Minnesota Senator Amy Klobuchar here. I’ve always been guided by the values I was raised with in Minnesota. My grandfather was an iron ore miner who spent his days working 1,500 feet underground. He saved what he could in a coffee can in the basement -- and he used that money to send my dad to college. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64270507/409561020/-1773662333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230603_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzkxNDVjMC0yNzAyLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rT26FSFxJj9B4FYUt3BLAwdbsZ-KCx4HzTsiOOwHt2c=) **I wouldn’t be here today without people like my grandfather and my dad who worked hard to build a better future. clean_body: | Hi, Minnesota Senator Amy Klobuchar here. I’ve always been guided by the values I was raised with in Minnesota. My grandfather was an iron ore miner who spent his days working 1,500 feet underground. He saved what he could in a coffee can in the basement -- and he used that money to send my dad to college. = I wouldn’t be here today without people like my grandfather and my dad who worked hard to build a better future. Now, it’s our turn to build a stronger future by fighting for progress on the most pressing issues facing our country. Will you split a contribution between myself and Tina Smith today to help power the fight for progress? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Amy Klobuchar and Tina Smith: ** | | = = | = = | = = I’m working in the Senate to deliver real results to make people’s lives better, and supporters like you have already helped me make a difference. After years of fighting Big Pharma, we finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices. We also capped insulin costs for millions of seniors. But our work is far from over. From making child care more affordable to bringing high-speed internet access to rural communities, there’s much more to get done – and that’s why I’m asking for your ongoing support. =** Amy Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

Let's face it, Peter:

Tate Reeves has turned a blind eye to the issues that truly matter, disregarded the needs of hardworking people and families, and shamelessly bowed to the demands of special interests and lobbyists.

But that’s not how we roll around here.

As Public Service Commissioner, Brandon opened up closed-door meetings to the public — and cut back on government gifts for lobbyists.

That’s because Brandon is running to represent Mississippians, not the special interests. When his name goes on the ballot, your name goes on the ballot.

And that’s why we’re reaching out. **We want to know which issues matter most to YOU.**

We're only inviting our most committed supporters to participate, and we have personally selected you to represent TEMECULA, Peter.

**Because we're asking such a small group, we need everyone to respond to ensure our results are accurate, so please, will you take a moment to share your thoughts before our midnight deadline?**

This weekend, Nikki will be in Iowa attending https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7bc5b64d002a51678efa9ed8d7a3f8392476ceabdb5cb2174e877ec1949f240fcf519f5e49eddd5fd951bb36cfb619ab7213301faba1df2b17ffb520d3002e1f Sen. Next week, Nikki will travel to Texas to talk about her plan to strengthen America’s energy industry. Take a look at the highlights: THIS WEEK Nikki attracted a record-breaking crowd in Connecticut, selling out the CT GOP’s Prescott Bush dinner. Politico Playbook: “ON THE TRAIL — NIKKI HALEY is headlining the Connecticut Republican Party’s Prescott Bush dinner tonight in Stamford, where she’ll be introduced by state party chair BEN PROTO. The sold-out dinner will spill into an overflow room; according to the campaign, it’s the state party’s largest event in a decade.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=cc54d5911304c2dda164b3fb818c61c403a842c4e4a78697752979f0710d3738f4f040784e922161201386ff635342d9ff3b0886779bd2ad3cf57df415008955 Politico Playbook , 5/31/23) Connecticut Public Radio: Nikki Haley stumps in Stamford as she works to rally support for presidential bid ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=cc54d5911304c2ddcb613790ffb8877214c5067c35b496dc51ac86736fa71f29442e4ab93ed149f85e8f3714acd4900323ff7a9fdd4c663db56794cb3b21475a Connecticut Public Radio , 6/1/23) Hartford Courant: “Haley fired up the sellout crowd as the keynote speaker at the 44th annual Prescott Bush Awards Dinner, the year’s biggest fundraiser for the state Republican Party. She generated one of the largest crowds and the most attention in years as 550 diners filled a Stamford hotel ballroom and caused organizers to arrange an overflow room.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=cc54d5911304c2dd0a9e9541a605d85002df8e2a6364c07d425d030489d05e3f56448b3fd8e0ece1d647aa5ab89bc2387e2111bedc732fe9e04dff484ddffaf1 Hartford Courant , 5/31/23) TODAY: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=cc54d5911304c2dd18aaef19e9c8246fbb261ab48de4fc46d378c998a2422685af0b5cc56bac5919ba78b8a811da0e3c0406439c65c391d69e8df0e7301100dc Nikki is in Iowa attending Sen. Joni Ernst’s annual Roast and Ride. Nikki is thrilled to be in Iowa meeting voters and sharing her message with strong conservatives. We can’t wait to update you with pictures from the event! TOMORROW: Nikki will participate in a presidential town hall with CNN’s Jake Tapper. You will NOT want to miss it! This will be Nikki’s first national televised national town hall, which means Nikki will have the opportunity to share her story, why she’s running, and her plans to save our future across the airwaves. We hear from you. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=cc54d5911304c2dd1dc023205a2cbab219854ad61e830b3cef59e18080ccf96579bcbc5c35a8b4e924c25d4bd1d35805f6e11c2aee0311285fef115b93510b4d Will you be watching Nikki’s CNN town hall? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=cc54d5911304c2dd1dc023205a2cbab219854ad61e830b3cef59e18080ccf96579bcbc5c35a8b4e924c25d4bd1d35805f6e11c2aee0311285fef115b93510b4d LET US KNOW HERE >> WHAT VOTERS ARE SAYING: Letters to the editors are coming fast and furious and the results are in: The people love Nikki Haley. Greenville Online: “As the owner of a small business, I want a president who will cut the red tape, gut regulations, and look out for the little guy. I know Nikki Haley will do that as president, because I watched her do it as governor. During her tenure, she turned South Carolina into the ‘Beast of the Southeast’ and made our state an economic powerhouse.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d8bdde6deb371fe993a4a0fcd3557abe3474c6322d7ed891a653a75d45acbf381e9ae9e527df763315a90261f2479db6e145cc233c46a9aba2af816d0936024b Greenville Online , 6/2/23) New Hampshire Union Leader: “I attended Nikki Haley’s recent Vets for Nikki town hall. I heard a multi-point plan to protect veterans including more health care options and widespread mental health screening. I also heard a presidential candidate speak for an extended time with no notes, no podium, and no teleprompter, as she addressed the top issues in our country with practical solutions.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d8bdde6deb371fe9cd745ad8e9ce65d8495eaad485d24f20f5ccd30755bc056db8fc538d72a2eda09e5949a07c60ec88ce22c4b77c43a5e4e99d5833614c2053 New Hampshire Union Leader , 6/2/23) Concord Monitor: “Nikki Haley, this is a serious contender in the presidential race. The daughter of Indian immigrants, an accountant, a two-term governor of South Carolina, and ambassador to the United Nations where she took the ‘kick me’ sign off the United States! While governor of South Carolina, they amassed an impressive list of accomplishments. She speaks her mind.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d8bdde6deb371fe96b69fc58e06b03d33bd4f6d5e636a0024f081644577a9262ec0684bab6ba4eb36b1bbb636365859d51da7e92d2d824c66a4c4d46cc23df57 Concord Monitor , 5/30/23) Peter, thank you for taking the time to read this week’s update! This week, Nikki Haley attracted a record-breaking crowd in Connecticut, selling out the CT GOP’s Prescott Bush dinner. This weekend, Nikki will be in Iowa attending Sen. Joni Ernst’s annual Roast and Ride and participating in a town hall with CNN’s Jake Tapper . Next week, Nikki will travel to Texas to talk about her plan to strengthen America’s energy industry. Take a look at the highlights: THIS WEEK Nikki attracted a record-breaking crowd in Connecticut, selling out the CT GOP’s Prescott Bush dinner. Politico Playbook: “ON THE TRAIL — NIKKI HALEY is headlining the Connecticut Republican Party’s Prescott Bush dinner tonight in Stamford, where she’ll be introduced by state party chair BEN PROTO. The sold-out dinner will spill into an overflow room; according to the campaign, it’s the state party’s largest event in a decade.” ( Politico Playbook , 5/31/23) Connecticut Public Radio: Nikki Haley stumps in Stamford as she works to rally support for presidential bid ( Connecticut Public Radio , 6/1/23) Hartford Courant: “Haley fired up the sellout crowd as the keynote speaker at the 44th annual Prescott Bush Awards Dinner, the year’s biggest fundraiser for the state Republican Party. She generated one of the largest crowds and the most attention in years as 550 diners filled a Stamford hotel ballroom and caused organizers to arrange an overflow room.” ( Hartford Courant , 5/31/23) TODAY: Nikki is in Iowa attending Sen. Joni Ernst’s annual Roast and Ride. Nikki is thrilled to be in Iowa meeting voters and sharing her message with strong conservatives. We can’t wait to update you with pictures from the event! TOMORROW: Nikki will participate in a presidential town hall with CNN’s Jake Tapper. You will NOT want to miss it! This will be Nikki’s first national televised national town hall, which means Nikki will have the opportunity to share her story, why she’s running, and her plans to save our future across the airwaves. We hear from you. Will you be watching Nikki’s CNN town hall? LET US KNOW HERE >> WHAT VOTERS ARE SAYING: Letters to the editors are coming fast and furious and the results are in: The people love Nikki Haley. Greenville Online: “As the owner of a small business, I want a president who will cut the red tape, gut regulations, and look out for the little guy. I know Nikki Haley will do that as president, because I watched her do it as governor. During her tenure, she turned South Carolina into the ‘Beast of the Southeast’ and made our state an economic powerhouse.” ( Greenville Online , 6/2/23) New Hampshire Union Leader: “I attended Nikki Haley’s recent Vets for Nikki town hall. I heard a multi-point plan to protect veterans including more health care options and widespread mental health screening. I also heard a presidential candidate speak for an extended time with no notes, no podium, and no teleprompter, as she addressed the top issues in our country with practical solutions.” ( New Hampshire Union Leader , 6/2/23) Concord Monitor: “Nikki Haley, this is a serious contender in the presidential race. The daughter of Indian immigrants, an accountant, a two-term governor of South Carolina, and ambassador to the United Nations where she took the ‘kick me’ sign off the United States! While governor of South Carolina, they amassed an impressive list of accomplishments. She speaks her mind.” ( Concord Monitor , 5/30/23) Peter, thank you for taking the time to read this week’s update! If you haven’t followed Nikki Haley on social media yet, make sure to follow her on Facebook , Twitter , and Instagram for more of the latest updates. Have a wonderful weekend! -Team Haley DONATE NIKKI HALEY MERCHANDISE HIGHLIGHT: A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley this summer is with your very own Strong & Proud not Weak & Woke drink cooler ! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your drink cooler today! > GET YOURS NOW! NIKKI HALEY’S OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN STORE: VISIT STORE → JOIN TEAM HALEY With Election Day more than a year out, you may be wondering: Does my donation today really make an impact? The answer is, unequivocally, YES! Grassroots support is what Nikki’s fight to save America is built on. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor. Your generous support today will allow Nikki and our team to host town halls, hold rallies, meet with voters, and spread her conservative message all around the country. We’re just getting started and would love to have you on Team Haley! ">So, if you can spare it, a donation of $1, $10, or ANY amount goes a long way to help Nikki reach more voters! >> P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time toText NIKKI to 48324 and share this with 5 friends today! name: Bob Casey via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: 🗺️ Take a look at the map
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

_Hi there! We wanted to share this message from Senator Bob Casey of Pennsylvania. He’s running for re-election, and the GOP has made him one of their top targets, so anything you can give would go a long way toward helping him defend his seat — and our Democratic majority in the Senate. - Team Padilla_
* * *
Hi there —
Since I announced I’m running for re-election, you know what that means — **_the map is back!**_
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23-casey.HBeiVA&refcode=em230603-1-30&t=1&akid=1326%2E159979%2EeCA-s3)
When Republicans look at this map, they see an opportunity to take back the Senate here in Pennsylvania. The NRSC is already launching attack ads against me, and recruiting candidates to take back this seat in 2024.
[**We have to do all that we can to defend this seat and our Democratic majority in the Senate. Can you join our team by splitting a donation between my campaign and Alex Padilla’s campaign today?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23-casey.HBeiVA&refcode=em230603-1-30&t=2&akid=1326%2E159979%2EeCA-s3)
Families, union workers, and middle-class Americans across our state see something else in this map: massive investments in next-generation infrastructure and family-sustaining jobs.
That’s what we can achieve if we earn the votes of Pennsylvanians in every county from Erie to Bucks.
[**Let’s show the GOP that Pennsylvania is ready for the major fight ahead. Can you split a donation of any amount between Alex Padilla’s re-election and my campaign to protect our majority?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23-casey.HBeiVA&refcode=em230603-1-30&t=3&akid=1326%2E159979%2EeCA-s3)
**[DONATE >>](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23-casey.HBeiVA&refcode=em230603-1-30&t=4&akid=1326%2E159979%2EeCA-s3)**
You can be sure you’ll see more of this map soon — and we’re putting the work in NOW to ensure it stays blue on Election Day.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1326%2E159979%2EeCA-s3)

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWiNZ8PDNX

You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You
love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWiNZ8PDNX

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61874909:WiNZ8PDNX:m:3:2532013465:C93AC0B39BDC8DC021C98F2DE7663AAD:r

For our
children,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc4j27uivib7vbj281dn34jhs8g4kohgrm3vggs8_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h64ob2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrngm2aqvmhn3ih90j28219qg7gngl9pnbuhtvg0_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h64ob2c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjttu6eulq39cmkp62vt0e27dfmojaeo5opu1t1o_rp22sh2s8i66o75c3h64ob2c5h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

clean_body: It gets worse... | | | Friend, George Soros already snuck $50,000,000 into 2024 to buy Crooked Joe the White House. Then, just last month, a Soros-linked Super PAC pledged to spend another $75,000,000 targeting the top battleground states of the election. $125 MILLION in total... all linked to Soros... all intended to STOP our movement from winning back the White House. Friend, you would think that’s as bad as it gets, right? But sadly, the most nefarious plot of all is coming from WITHIN our own Party. Corrupt special interests claiming to be “Republicans” are spending $200 MILLION to try and eliminate our campaign in the primary! But if there’s one thing I’ve learned above all else over the last 8 years, it’s that we NEVER SURRENDER to those who think they can BUY our elections. While these RINOs seek to DIVIDE our Party and help Biden remain in the White House, we’re UNITING Americans behind Trump 2024. And our HISTORIC 50-POINT LEAD proves it! But now, I need YOUR help wrapping up the primary as quickly as possible so that we can shift 100% of our focus to the REAL mission: firing Crooked Joe Biden and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Friend,
From everyone at Team Terán, we want to say a big THANK YOU!
This past week, we sent you a bunch of emails regarding our May fundraising deadline and we are so grateful for all the generosity.
With your help, we were able to knock out our fundraising goal! Now, with you on the team, we are going to keep that momentum going in June and beyond.
We don't take any corporate PAC money and we don’t cater to the interests of lobbyists or special interest groups. Our campaign is made up of a coalition of communities coming together – immigrants, women, working families, LGBTQ folks and all those who have been counted out before.
Together – as a family – we can continue fighting forward and win. Thank you for being a valued part of this team.
A ganar,
Raquel Terán

| Hi there,

This isn’t the news I was hoping to share today, but it’s important to me to be honest with my supporters: **we did not reach our May fundraising goal.**

clean_body: This isn’t the news I was hoping to share today, but it’s important to me to be honest with my supporters | = | Hi there, This isn’t the news I was hoping to share today, but it’s important to me to be honest with my supporters: we did not reach our May fundraising goal. I know this team gave it our all, and when we set ambitious goals we run the risk of coming up short. But with the House majority at stake in this district, we need serious resources to fight off Republican efforts to unseat me. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = I am so grateful for your ongoing support. name: Sara
subject: Thanks - and an update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
Thank you so much to everyone who showed their support for my re-election campaign during our end-of-May push. Every time I come to this team with what we’re working on - and why I need your support - I’m humbled and honored by how many of you step up and give what you can.
The tough update I have to share today is that we didn’t reach our May email fundraising goal. When we closed the books for the month, we fell a little short.
That doesn’t mean the world is ending - but it does mean that for the month of June, I need to spend more time focusing on getting our campaign budget back on track.
Especially since at the end of this month, we’ll file our next official report with the Federal Election Commission - and our donations and expenditures will become public to everyone from the press to my opponent.
If you didn’t have a chance to donate before the end of May, please consider making a donation now to start June off strong and help get our budget closer to where it needs to be. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
I’ll continue to share my usual personal and legislative updates with this group throughout the month - but thanks in advance for sticking with me while we work hard on this fundraising effort, too. We can’t do any of the other important stuff if I lose my election next year!
Talk soon,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

subject: What if Katie’s whiteboard said…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Hear me out...
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)
Hi Derek—it’s me, Katie Porter’s whiteboard!
When Congress is in session, Katie keeps me busy grilling corporate hacks and Big Pharma executives. But lately, I’ve been thinking about how I could help with Katie’s campaign for the U.S. Senate....
**What would you think if this was written on me, the whiteboard?**
* Katie’s primary is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate primary _ever._
* Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money.
* Three recent polls show Katie in the lead among voters—but falling behind financially to those who _have_ accepted corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money.

**[What do you say, Derek? Can you make a contribution of $5 today to support Katie in this competitive primary?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230602-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI03_3_WHI_20230603_V1_F&refcode2=24104_3422442_nDVl6p&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)**
**[Yes, I'll donate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230602-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI03_3_WHI_20230603_V1_F&refcode2=24104_3422442_nDVl6p&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)**
That’s not all I have to say about this race, though. I spend a lot of time with Katie—she even keeps me in her purse, in case she runs into a Big Oil executive who needs to be held accountable! So believe me when I say, Katie is the best candidate to represent California in the U.S. Senate.
**Here’s what else I want you to know:**
* Republican super PACs spent around $10 million against Katie last year—but she still pulled ahead _and_ defended a once Republican district.
* When she was first elected in 2018, Katie was the only single mom of school age kids in Congress.
* Katie doesn’t just talk the talk—she is the co-founder and co-chair of the College Affordability Caucus and End Corruption Caucus, where she fights for making college affordable and holds her colleagues accountable.

**[With all that said, can you consider making a contribution of $5 today to help send a true warrior for families to the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230602-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI03_3_WHI_20230603_V1_F&refcode2=24104_3422442_nDVl6p&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)**
Thank you for supporting Katie and following the work I help her accomplish!
—Katie Porter’s whiteboard
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230602-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI03_3_WHI_20230603_V1_F&refcode2=24104_3422442_nDVl6p&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI03_3_WHI_20230603_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=24104_3422442_nDVl6p&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=6&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=24104%2E3422442%2EnDVl6p)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

We must continue the fight until every state has fair maps that truly reflect the will of the people.
|
---

Friend,
For the past five years, All On The Line has been at the forefront of the fight for fair maps, both in state and federal courts. We have tirelessly worked to protect and strengthen the right to vote for all people. [**And our efforts have not gone unnoticed.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64273333/409571673/-773826618?refcode=20230603_AOTL_F_June1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyOGM4OTIxLTMwMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hQ33Tob_Ab12MD3bGjghjm681mUlmnWT_XbMe0UcMUc=)
Justices across the ideological spectrum, in state and federal courts, have recognized the importance of fair maps and have struck down illegal gerrymanders in states like North Carolina and Ohio. Their rulings have been pivotal in ensuring that the voices of the people are not silenced and that our democracy remains strong and representative.
We are proud to have been a part of these victories, fighting alongside folks like you who share our passion for fair representation.
**And now, as we approach decision day in the U.S. Supreme Court cases, we want to remind everyone of our preparation and our commitment to navigating the redistricting landscape in the aftermath of these decisions.[Will you make a donation to All On The Line today to help support our work now and into the future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64273334/409571674/-773826618?refcode=20230603_AOTL_F_June1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyOGM4OTIxLTMwMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hQ33Tob_Ab12MD3bGjghjm681mUlmnWT_XbMe0UcMUc=)**

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64273339/409571679/-773826618?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20230603_AOTL_F_June1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyOGM4OTIxLTMwMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hQ33Tob_Ab12MD3bGjghjm681mUlmnWT_XbMe0UcMUc=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64273340/409571680/-773826618?refcode=20230603_AOTL_F_June1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyOGM4OTIxLTMwMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hQ33Tob_Ab12MD3bGjghjm681mUlmnWT_XbMe0UcMUc=)
**Our goal is clear: we must continue the fight until every state has fair maps that truly reflect the will of the people.** Our team has been diligently preparing for all potential outcomes. We are ready to take action and fight for fair maps no matter what the Supreme Court decides.
But we cannot achieve this without your support. We need your help to amplify our message, secure resources, and remain leaders in this critical moment.
[**Rush a donation to All On The Line today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64273341/409571681/-773826618?refcode=20230603_AOTL_F_June1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyOGM4OTIxLTMwMDItZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hQ33Tob_Ab12MD3bGjghjm681mUlmnWT_XbMe0UcMUc=)

name: America First War Room
subject: James O'Keefe: "Their final attack on me..."
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.
| | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDBIYE5cNgtYqSOVKmnqqeVhzgzmSWEDUFo3r4CbXuo9vr5s3_LJj-Pzj5bqF8B8e7MAoggXwDx4_fm4_rwl3N-fhH5h_7h1V7Eb4CYnjP_Mz-HFOzJjTutu8y0pMmyybgtdaOasqxPOru3Sp0qI2uhbGWoOpGqbKOv1khhSWlZZ65FgVJoIctayLIsVHWqlWksSkNcNRIqcQQVVG4UYwi-GILPxvae0rwcG_WA_cLDGrmgiU1IuwHYj-7KMT3z20rRAPYP8rzk4Z3Zck4p0fCe-2sePMh-Tf5tCWscGGT3hQiod8WzcasH2e0BBxnIz-RuE8jOXz9Z4rg7W0RATT6sUwLZofrbEqbEB5qGMe812if_vDwkoH6bRmdAdv_B41Oy-_5r68-X8jWLrZk3N45u0TVU4nYcaAj-TwAAAP__09iXJw)
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcFunDAQhp9muIHweLHJgUNSxEaN2mvUUzTYw64TjIkxRfv2FWjbQ5XrN9_MP5ohP49uuDWgnwDx6uwCiCAfAfHz1-bj-u5fzvn5scw_1U9f7UX8BojpNvM_8z6kYE9u3KluM9uQooFtxo1QdVULoR9Udm0UlYZkVfe6JkJtpRhqUqa2RNxXmjPXYImyVKUUupRCFNXpQVe2HlBa4lMt4VQeQQWJjWIMwRcm-GxsrinNy7FRB9gtbNbIBU1sQ9oNwG50Pcd0yy8rRQvYvZPnJQ8fzAPnlBKZj9z3efAguzX5tyWs0TDI9gsRUO2KZ-tWD7LdAw5iyM_kLhPI1vd3ljjuzhYRUJEP65RAtlj9bQlT4gNNZsyfX2f7e_jBzxFQvU2jsyDb_-DxKdl-f92684t4ymJj582No1uUhlN5OQ5kgv8TAAD__0ddmSU)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskc-OnDAMh5_G3BglDgQ4cNgpYqqu1EN7qHpa5R8z2cWEDUGIt69A2x6qvX7-7J9lK5pHP-wtVFdAfHi7ACKIJ0B8_71RXF_p-Zbfnlj-Lr9TeRTxCyCmfXb_zI8hF0fKjwetusy2SqrB2cy1XNZlzXnVyOzRMlOIptYlK7kaGtPoqpZaGK1rqbhuMPMtMhRMMsErJji_lEVTlbYeUFjlilpAwc6gi-KbijEEuphA2dg-UpqXc6MesF-cWaO7qMnZkA4DsB-9djHt-X1V0QL2r4rckoc35waXq5SUectJ54FA9GuilyWs0TgQ3ScioDwUctavBKI7Ak5iFM3K3ycQHekPllw8nC0ioFQU1imB6LD82xKm5E40mTH_gT9xX6_T1x1QvkyjtyC6_-D5KdF9-7X1t2d-zWJr582Po19kBQW7nwcygf4EAAD__yGEl8Y)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOm0AMhp_G3ECDh4Fw4LBbRKSu1Fu16mnlMCaZLGbYYRDK21egtIeq18-f_Vs2yTy64dFA9QqIN2cXQAT9AohfvzYJ613ezun5RaVf5Q8xexG_AWJ8zPzXfA7JWMiNO63axDZU0sA24SYvT-aU51VdJrfGDjQoNehCUT6oujCmGmqN2nBhKoN14hpUqFWpdF4pneeZKerK2NOA2hIXJw2FOoIyyjcKwXvJei_J2NxinJdjow6wW7hfA2c0sfVxNwC70V04xEd6XSlYwO5OwkvqP5kHTilG6j9TuaReQHdrlI_Fr6Fn0O1_RMByV4StWwV0uwccpCeZyV0n0K1cnixy2J0tIGBJ4tcpgm7R_GnxU-QDTf2YUnfj-i7Xn--A5cc0Ogu6_Qcen9Lt9_etO7_lr0lo7Ly5cXRLWUGhrseBei-_AwAA__-D9JeV)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcFupDAMhp_G3EDBhgAHDu0iRtpKva1WPVWZxAxpCaEhCM3br0Cze1j1-vmzf8tWbpnscG-hegbE0ZoVEIGeAPHrbXdh-3Avl_TyJNIv-erKo4g_ADHeF_5nPoZk7JSdDlp1iWmVVAObhNtc1mWd51Ujk7GtRWlIUy0LvpYCiYaGS91UQms9mKpJbIsCSUhBeSUoz7OyaKrS1AOSUVzUBIU4gzKV7yoE712mvUumdoxxWc-NesB-Zb0FztTMxsfDAOwne-UQ7-ltU8EA9h_K8Zr6T-aBUxWj0p-pu6beAfVbdO-r34JmoO4bEVAeimNjNwfUHQEn0cotyt5moM5dHyxyOJw9IKBUzm9zBOqw_Nvi58gnmvWUvo2vvy5xo9AAyvd5sgao-w-en6Lu5--9v7zkz0lozbLbabKrrKAQt_NA2rs_AQAA__81YZfl)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDEIYE5cNgtYqWO1FtV9bQyiZnJLiFsCELTp69A20qVev382b9lk18mNz5aqJ8B8e7sCoggnwDx4-fu4_bmry_5y1OZf-hvXh1F_AKI6bHwX_NzSMGe3HTQustsS5pGthm3QjeqEaK-6OzealGStSQao5gvckBdCiuoGowyoySVuRZLlKUupahLKUShqkutbDOitMRVI6Eqz6CCxE4xhuALE3w2tfeUlvXcqAfsVzZb5IJmtiEdBmA_uYFjeuS3jaIF7N_I85qHd-aRc0qJzHvuhzx4kP2W_OsatmgYZPcfEVAfimfrNg-yOwJOYsgv5G4zyM4PnyxxPJw9IqAmH7Y5gexQ_WkJc-ITzWbK8crKPr4Pl1-A-nWenD3cf-H5Kdl9_bH3L1fxnMXWLrubJrfqGqrydh7IBP87AAD__7-PmCc)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. And leadership has a price.” I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That’s where you come in. ? When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced. Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer. But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. Friend, . And I’ll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O’Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, .

| | Peter, the hard truth is that in Senate races like ours, whoever spends the most money usually — _but not always_ — wins. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1771?t=12&amount=25&akid=116%2E52803%2E17sV7t) **This won’t be the last time we see a headline like this, because unlike my opponent, I’m not a millionaire.** Instead, we’re building a grassroots campaign and asking supporters to chip in what they can, when they can. [**Will you help fuel our campaign by chipping in a grassroots donation of $25 (or whatever you can) to help counter campaign spending by my ultra-wealthy opponent? Any amount goes a long way when enough supporters step up.**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1771?t=13&amount=25&akid=116%2E52803%2E17sV7t) | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1771?t=14&amount=25&akid=116%2E52803%2E17sV7t)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1771?t=15&amount=35&akid=116%2E52803%2E17sV7t)
---
This is going to be a tough race, and there’s too much at stake to let money be the reason we come up short.
My opponent can write his campaign blank checks to flood the airwaves with TV commercials to spread his message far and wide.
Those are things we need to do to reach voters, too — _but the question on everyone’s mind is whether or not we can raise enough money through grassroots support to avoid getting drowned out._
**We have what it takes to win, but we need to make sure our Maryland-first message can break through to voters.[Can you please chip in $25 so we can cut through the noise and connect with the folks we need to win?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1771?t=16&amount=25&akid=116%2E52803%2E17sV7t)**

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee90c64690e640dc92d74916fc199984&_e=4TTMMT6SMbkvus9LdLVLldYDxPw050QVvL9QLUP_aqfbmo1_-t6X1b0vAgpB9UFRbM3Q2zOrbpW8J-0flGaDiM7cFEGeyTN8K4w0q1xfj_5RGZbM87Tw2CYtxsYaMD73nq8jI4DCJJ4sPN3WD8dT4eAa0SDlG214smxemfUd68qryuel9fL-t7WHQ9du0LQAvlxChvR8qJUpJfPQ-zrD3Q5KTyqs_piyzgP_iH9pqWYX7m_C7t6ahIrSF2HK-4OiFsCu6_xRMb61h6LdmQN7bYJiALoOeG9Sh_8zuHgxL1jwsZBnIrwwRTjARoxLeVAy)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee90c64690e640dc92d74916fc199984&_e=4TTMMT6SMbkvus9LdLVLldYDxPw050QVvL9QLUP_aqfbmo1_-t6X1b0vAgpB9UFRbM3Q2zOrbpW8J-0flGaDiM7cFEGeyTN8K4w0q1xfj_5RGZbM87Tw2CYtxsYaMD73nq8jI4DCJJ4sPN3WD8dT4eAa0SDlG214smxemfUd68qjbVdn0cBoMq78afO3emSmxNfy8ANkvgL6WeX46fKDB2ayAWfDBoVTBKMPekpoB6FMWvxsYpAO3F3KpHJrVLUNzF9MJSXQbfai6WmB-E-R7hH_ImvuhPdWht5qJiAGrEDNZeUe8sLw7PBh2dmo3cji)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee90c64690e640dc92d74916fc199984&_e=4TTMMT6SMbkvus9LdLVLldYDxPw050QVvL9QLUP_aqfbmo1_-t6X1b0vAgpB9UFRbM3Q2zOrbpW8J-0flGaDiM7cFEGeyTN8K4w0q1xfj_5RGZbM87Tw2CYtxsYaMD73nq8jI4DCJJ4sPN3WD8dT4eAa0SDlG214smxemfUd68qME6d3bT0v9godxU2jJDQ-D2tSOqSyFpMSnn5ovKiXOcED45i4jTmgmOTtP3ODSPm2_80S8NjUlmiQRzLfjqchd99WzgRjQM3puweSPn1u125wzQD2qQB2TzBm23hMFmmuoWbu-QljhPZXceN1EsS1)

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee90c64690e640dc92d74916fc199984&_e=4TTMMT6SMbkvus9LdLVLldYDxPw050QVvL9QLUP_aqfbmo1_-t6X1b0vAgpB9UFRbM3Q2zOrbpW8J-0flGaDiM7cFEGeyTN8K4w0q1xfj_5RGZbM87Tw2CYtxsYaMD73nq8jI4DCJJ4sPN3WD8dT4eAa0SDlG214smxemfUd68oHV0mSdeG7-YOSg5swsKbMJFc9UxPXnNUs5iwz00dCgVK6xGZr3-hb5gKmRamYsZKikUAZ9CsNNrgUyioOM_5aJ24g4bsxpBPUAnkmOpbiNbRtJQhyTE-InM5CpUbM2HomIZqznuxcVNjrXuKyryJM)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Graduation Announcement

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
Last week, I watched my daughter, Helene, walk across a stage and accept her high school diploma.
To say I am proud is an understatement.
I’ve watched my daughter struggle, learn, and grow in school for the past twelve years. Now, I can’t wait to see her embark on her next big adventure — in a world more open to her because of her education.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060323_Graduation_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060323_Graduation_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060323_Graduation_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060323_Graduation_act]
One of my core beliefs is that every child deserves access to a great education. It’s what got me into politics years ago. I volunteered in Helene’s classroom and was horrified to see how budget cuts were negatively impacting our schools.
We must invest in public schools and support our teachers. I fought for this in the Arizona legislature, and I’ll fight for this in Congress.
My opponent voted yes on a bill that would have CUT funding for education nationwide. Arizona deserves better.
I’ll work to make sure that every child in Arizona is set up for success in school and life. Will you support my campaign to flip this seat blue by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060323_Graduation_act]
Thank you so much,
— Kirsten
