In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Innocent wolf pups, violently slaughtered
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1804450?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Blood in the snow. Mangled fur. A mother wolf dying in pain, trying to protect her young pups. Now suffering from HYPOTHERMIA and STARVATION without their mother, _the baby wolves die next to her._** This gruesome and tragic scene is the norm in regions like the Northern Rockies states that border Yellowstone -- where there are currently **NO federal safeguards** to keep gray wolves safe from _**VICIOUS TROPHY HUNTERS**_ who are KILLING OFF these iconic canines in droves. Wolf populations across the country are plummeting as they’re being _**MASSACRED by ruthless trophy hunters.**_ Now, wolf hunting season is starting up again -- which means more of these precious animals are in danger of being **VIOLENTLY SLAUGHTERED.** **[Please, Friend, add your name NOW to DEMAND stronger protections for wolves against CRUEL hunting practices before it’s too late>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1804451?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1804452?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming allow some of the **MOST HORRIFIC** hunting practices like **__CHOKING__** wolves to death in snares, __**RUNNING THEM OVER**__ with snowmobiles, and _**even DYNAMITING nursing wolf mothers and pups in their dens.**_
**But now, the Biden Administration has filed an appeal to REMOVE some critical protections for wolves, which could push this vulnerable species closer to _EXTINCTION._**
If we are going to _**SAVE GRAY WOLVES**_ and **_STOP THESE MERCILESS KILLINGS_** , we must EXPAND and STRENGTHEN federal protections -- not _remove_ them. [**Wolves need you right now, Friend. Will you take action today before we lose this iconic animal forever?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1804453?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1804452?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting wolves,
Friends of the Earth **
|

Joe and Kamala have led our country forward with determination and grit. Thanks to Democratic majorities that you built and your outside mobilization, Democrats delivered For The People: we’ve lowered prescription drug costs for people all over the country, while making unprecedented investments in our nation’s infrastructure and clean energy. Under the leadership of President Biden and Vice President Harris and with the hard work of Democrats in Congress, our unemployment rate is the lowest it has been in decades.
While Joe and Kamala have been focused on building meaningful progress, extreme Republicans have been busy demonstrating just how out of touch they are with the American people -- pushing for a nationwide abortion ban, threatening to slash Social Security and Medicare, and attacking voting rights and our democracy.
Over the last few years, we have seen an extreme MAGA movement work tirelessly in states across the country to diminish freedom of reproductive care and health care, freedom from gun violence and discrimination, and freedom to make a living and retire with dignity and have a say in the destiny of our democracy.
Make no mistake: if Republicans win in 2024, they’ll bring this dangerous agenda nationwide. The fight for freedom is the fight we face -- not only in 2024, but right this very minute.
Democrats must guard the progress that we have won For The People and defend our freedoms and democracy. Together, we must take back the House; grow our majority in the Senate; and reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris to a second term in the White House!
The choice is clear. We can allow Republicans to elect their most extreme candidates to the White House and roll back all the results and progress we fought so hard to deliver together...or we can do everything we can right now to reelect Joe and Kamala.
[I know my choice and I hope you do, too. Friend,
A new nationwide poll of Republican primary voters was just released, and I wanted to be sure you saw the results.

**TRUMP _LEADS by 48 points_ **
Who would do a better job handling _foreign policy_?
**TRUMP _LEADS by 44 points_ **
Who would do a better job handling _immigration_?
**TRUMP _LEADS by 44 points_ **
Who would do a better job handling _crime_?
**TRUMP _LEADS by 26 points_ **
Who has the _best chance_ to win the 2024 general election _against Biden_?

subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
Pride Month is Over No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-alhply-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* **[FBI gave bonus](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-y/)** for targeting conservatives.
* Inmates **[have more rights](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-j/)** than you think.
* Farmers are **[ruining the planet](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-t/).**
* Lindsay Graham is**[a wanted man](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-i/).**
* Trump wants to**[outlaw birth tourism](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-d/).**
* **[Dems want to ban](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-h/) **third-party candidates from ballots.
* Mike Pence is **[jumping into](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-k/)** the Presidental race.
* Disney**[ran out of women](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-u/)** to hire.
* Ron DeSantis had **[kicked off his campaign](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-o/)** in Iowa.
* The **[only reason](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-x/)** Biden is running for re-election.
* **[Biden took a fall](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-m/)** at the Air Force Academy Graduation.
* Trump also had a **[campaign rally in Iowa](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-c/).**

### **Pride Month is Over**
The**[U.S. Navy has taken down posts celebrating LGBTQ+ Pride month](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-q/)** on social media, including rainbow banners that read, "Pride."
### **Ignoring Native Americans**
The Biden administration is**[moving forward with a 20-year ban on new oil and gas leasing near an Indigenous cultural site in New Mexico](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-a/) **despite stark opposition from Native Americans in the region. **This Must Be Fixed** The large-scale voter contact effort that conservatives have put at the center of their political operations in recent years **i[s plagued with issues including fraudulent and untrustworthy data entries.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-f/)** [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-e/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alhply-trhiujldw-w/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley: “Let me be clear: control of the Senate could come down to this seat”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — Josh Hawley is starting to panic.
**Just read what he told his top donors in a message about his race against Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat:**
**_“Let me be clear: control of the Senate COULD come down to this seat...”_**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33668?refcode=em20230603-3212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3212%2E614464%2Eunr-Ag)**
After showing himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th and failing Missourians in the U.S. Senate, Josh Hawley made himself one of the most vulnerable GOP Senators up for re-election this cycle — and it shows.
**IN MARCH:** An approval poll showed Hawley underwater with Missourians — a net-negative rating and drawing “intensely negative sentiment” from 39% of Missouri voters compared to only 26% who feel strongly favorable.
**IN APRIL:** After months of desperate attacks from Hawley’s insider friends at the National Republican Senatorial Committee, our campaign managed to outraise Hawley’s by nearly 2-1 in the most recent fundraising quarter.
**AND THEN:** Some of Hawley’s top supporters are now refusing to support him this cycle — including Big Tech billionaire Peter Thiel, who’s donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to Hawley’s previous election bids and reportedly said he won’t support any Republicans this cycle due to their out-of-touch culture wars.
**All of this means we have a real opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for the people next year, but it’s not going to be easy.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33668?refcode=em20230603-3212&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3212%2E614464%2Eunr-Ag)**
**GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are doing everything in their power to make Josh Hawley look strong.** They launched one of their very first attack ads this cycle against Lucas Kunce and — on the very last day of the most recent FEC fundraising quarter — used their joint committee with Hawley to transfer _$250,000_ directly to his campaign.
If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend to tear down our campaign in the off-year, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks and put Hawley’s campaign in the position to win.
**That’s why we need your help today, Peter.** Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to raise the kind of money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley and get our positive vision for Missouri in front of voters as soon, and as often, as possible.
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? clean_body: Peter — Josh Hawley is starting to panic. Just read what he told his top donors in a message about his race against Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat: “Let me be clear: control of the Senate COULD come down to this seat...” After showing himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th and failing Missourians in the U.S. Senate, Josh Hawley made himself one of the most vulnerable GOP Senators up for re-election this cycle — and it shows. IN MARCH: An approval poll showed Hawley underwater with Missourians — a net-negative rating and drawing “intensely negative sentiment” from 39% of Missouri voters compared to only 26% who feel strongly favorable. IN APRIL: After months of desperate attacks from Hawley’s insider friends at the National Republican Senatorial Committee, our campaign managed to outraise Hawley’s by nearly 2-1 in the most recent fundraising quarter. AND THEN: Some of Hawley’s top supporters are now refusing to support him this cycle — including Big Tech billionaire Peter Thiel, who’s donated hundreds of thousands of dollars to Hawley’s previous election bids and reportedly said he won’t support any Republicans this cycle due to their out-of-touch culture wars. All of this means we have a real opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for the people next year, but it’s not going to be easy. GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are doing everything in their power to make Josh Hawley look strong. They launched one of their very first attack ads this cycle against Lucas Kunce and — on the very last day of the most recent FEC fundraising quarter — used their joint committee with Hawley to transfer $250,000 directly to his campaign. If these are the kind of resources they’re willing to spend to tear down our campaign in the off-year, it’s only a matter of time before they start spending even more to ramp up their attacks and put Hawley’s campaign in the position to win. That’s why we need your help today, Peter. Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to raise the kind of money we need to mount a serious challenge to a corrupt, incumbent politician like Hawley and get our positive vision for Missouri in front of voters as soon, and as often, as possible. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, — Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Happy Pride from #TeamLizzie!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230603?refcode=folf230603 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230603?refcode=folf230603]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230603?refcode=folf230603 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230603?refcode=folf230603]
Each June, we celebrate our LGBTQI+ community and celebrate the progress reflected in people living authentic, fulfilling lives. I’m so proud to represent TX-07’s diverse and dynamic LGBTQI+ community—from its longtime heart in Houston’s Montrose area to every corner of the district.
As we celebrate Pride Month, we also recognize the relentless attacks on LGBTQI+ people in Texas and across the country. Nearly 500 anti-LGBTQI+ bills have been introduced across the country this year. And unfortunately, Texas lawmakers in Austin are leading the way, introducing more than 50 anti-LGBTQI+ bills this legislative session.
That does not reflect our values as Houstonians or Texans. And that is why it is important for me to be a part of the Congressional Equality Caucus: to bring the diverse and affirming voice of #TX07 to Washington. And this year, I am honored to have become a Vice Chair of the caucus. I will continue to do all I can to advance equality, combat discrimination, and improve opportunities and access for our LGBTQI+ community.
At the same time, I am committed to expanding those voices and that work. This year, I was proud to be asked to serve on the Board of the Equality PAC, the political arm of the Congressional Equality Caucus, whose mission is to support and elect openly LGBTQ individuals and strong LGBTQ allies to the United States Congress.
Each June we are reminded of how important it is to live authentically with pride. And it’s important to elect people who will work to make that possible for all people. I am also reminded each June that working together with people to make the world a better place is not only important, it is also fun. It is something to celebrate. And that is what we do this June. Happy Pride!
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230603?refcode=folf230603]

name: Joe Biden
subject: Today I signed our bipartisan budget agreement into law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m writing to let you know that the House and the Senate have passed our bipartisan budget agreement. And, earlier today, I signed it into law. | | |
---
Peter -- **I’m writing to let you know that the House and the Senate have passed our bipartisan budget agreement. And, earlier today, I signed it into law.** This agreement is a _big_ win for our economy and for the American people. It prevents a default that could have thrown us into an economic crisis, costing millions of jobs and devastating retirement accounts. Nothing would have been more irresponsible. The agreement protects the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law that’s rebuilding America, the CHIPS and Science Act that’s helping fuel a resurgence in American manufacturing, and the Inflation Reduction Act that’s boosting clean energy development and lowering prescription costs. It also protects the historic economic progress we’ve made together -- including more than 13 million jobs created and historically low unemployment. **In this agreement, no one got everything they wanted._But the American people got what they needed._** We’re protecting important priorities including Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, veterans’ benefits, and our transformational investments in infrastructure and clean energy. Our work is far from finished, Peter. But, this agreement is a critical step forward. _It’s a reminder of what’s possible when we act in the best interests of our country._ Bipartisanship is hard. Unity is hard. But we can never stop trying. Because -- no matter how tough our politics gets -- we need to see each other as fellow Americans, to join forces, and work together to keep the promise of America for everyone. I’ve said it before and I will say it again: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future. **There is nothing we can’t do when we work together.** Thank you for your support throughout this process, Joe Joe Biden
